mapper.sql: id, code, name, subtitle, product_type, price_cents, score_amount, gold_coin_amount, vip_type, vip_days, tag_label, badge_label, enabled, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_store_product WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_store_product WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_store_product SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, product_type = #{productType}, price_cents = #{priceCents}, score_amount = #{scoreAmount}, gold_coin_amount = #{goldCoinAmount}, vip_type = #{vipType}, vip_days = #{vipDays}, tag_label = #{tagLabel}, badge_label = #{badgeLabel}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
